ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported
e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2, Daily

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, How interested have you been in sexual activity?
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, How often have you felt like you wanted to have sex?
In the past 30 days, How often have you had sexual thoughts or fantasies while you were awake?
In the past 30 days, How often were you interested enough to start a sexual activity?
PROMIS Interest in Sexual Activity: Final T-score
PROMIS Interest in Sexual Activity: Final Raw Score
